title: AMR phenotype labels (CSV)
description: Per-genome resistant/susceptible phenotypes, one column per drug. Read by Module 2 as a training target. This JSON Schema documents the CSV row shape; the file on disk is a CSV, not JSON.

genome_id.description: Join key against the Module 1 feature matrix (features_binary). Must be unique.

^(?!genome_id$).+$.description: One column per drug. Cell values: 'R' (resistant), 'S' (susceptible), 'I' (intermediate, treated as unknown), or empty (phenotype not measured). Anything else is a hard error.

x-notes: A drug column may be sparsely populated; genomes with an empty/I cell for a drug are simply excluded from that drug's train/eval set.
Positive class is R. A drug with fewer than the configured minimum labelled genomes per class is skipped and reported, not trained.
